mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_user_preferences(user_id, favorite_genres, preferred_rating_range, disliked_movies, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{userId}, #{favoriteGenres}, #{preferredRatingRange}, #{dislikedMovies}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE favorite_genres = VALUES(favorite_genres), preferred_rating_range = VALUES(preferred_rating_range), disliked_movies = VALUES(disliked_movies), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
